text: They spent $50 billion. They built 2.4 kilometres. Then they stopped. This was supposed to house nine million people.
img_prompt: Establish the abandonment of the project immediately. A photorealistic aerial top-down view of The Line megastructure foundation trench in the vast Tabuk desert. A massive linear excavation cuts through the barren landscape, ending abruptly to reveal only 2.4 kilometres of completed groundwork. Tiny abandoned yellow excavators and construction vehicles sit idle at the trench edge to emphasize the staggering scale. Heavy overcast sky casts cold grey-blue diffused light across the scene, creating a somber, desolate mood. Fine dust particles and wind-swept sand haze fill the immense void of the ditch. Photorealistic CGI render, cinematic quality, 8K, ultra-detailed textures, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, teal-orange color grade, subtle film grain, no text, no watermarks.
video_prompt: Aerial top-down shot of The Line megastructure foundation trench lying abandoned in the Tabuk desert. The camera slowly cranes up to emphasize the abrupt end of the 2.4 kilometre excavation. Tiny idle excavators and vehicles remain motionless against the vast, desolate scale of the ditch. The heavy overcast lighting enhances the somber reality of the halted project. Shot with an anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, teal-orange color grade, and cinematic quality. Audio: desolate wind blowing across the open desert trench. SFX: faint, eerie creak of idle metal machinery. Music: tense low strings building to a somber drone. Negative: subtitles, captions, watermark, text overlay, blurry faces, distorted geometry, cartoon style.

text: It's now a ditch in the desert. The Line. Saudi Arabia's answer to the city of the future.
img_prompt: Reveal the intended glory of the futuristic vision compared to its reality. A dramatic ground-level perspective looking up at the imposing, unbroken mirror facade of The Line in the Saudi Arabian desert. The towering 500-metre-tall glass wall reflects the harsh desert environment, stretching endlessly toward the horizon like a futuristic mirage. Tiny human figures in traditional and modern clothing stand at the base, gazing upward in awe at the sheer scale of the monolith. Warm golden hour light rakes from the east, casting long shadows and painting surfaces in amber and ochre. Heat shimmer and golden dust in sun shafts create a thick atmospheric depth. Photorealistic CGI render, cinematic quality, 8K, ultra-detailed textures, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, teal-orange color grade, subtle film grain, no text, no watermarks.
video_prompt: Ground-level shot looking up at the imposing mirror facade of The Line reflecting the Saudi desert. The camera slowly dollies back to reveal the full towering scope of the 500-metre glass wall. Tiny human figures remain static at the base, overwhelmed by the colossal scale of the futuristic monolith. Golden hour sunlight rakes across the glass, captured with an anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, teal-orange color grade, and cinematic quality.
